---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Applied analytics work - models, strategy, and the reasoning behind them."
pagetitle: "Projects - Sritanya Suresh Andal"
description: "A grid of analytical projects covering fraud detection, HR attrition modelling, and strategic analysis under uncertainty."
listing:
  id: project-listing
  contents: list
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  image-height: 220px
  grid-columns: 3
  feed: true
  page-size: 12
toc: false
---

[A working archive]{.kicker}

::: {.lede}
These are the analytical projects I return to when I want to explain how I think. Each one pairs the numbers with the judgement calls behind them - because the decisions underneath the model usually matter more than the model itself.
:::

Each project page includes the live **Python code** that produced the charts and tables you see. Nothing here is a screenshot.

::: {#project-listing}
:::
